user.title: GardenESP IrrigationController
user.description: Set up the integration. Boxes, lines, water sources and sensors are managed afterwards in the panel.

start_line.name: Start line
start_line.description: Starts an irrigation line through the full coordinator path (source lock, gates, consumption logging, settling). Lets external automations drive irrigation with their own logic instead of toggling the raw valve switch.

line_id.name: Line ID
line_id.description: ID of the line to start (e.g. ln_ff3a7f58). Shown in the GardenESP panel line list.

duration_min.name: Duration (min)
duration_min.description: Run duration in minutes; fractional allowed (0.3 = 18 s). Omit to use the line's manual default.

force.name: Force
force.description: Ignore the line's blocking sensor (rain/soil) for this run, like 'Start anyway' in the dashboard.

stop_line.name: Stop line
stop_line.description: Stops a running irrigation line, logging the watered portion.

line_id.name: Line ID
line_id.description: ID of the line to stop (e.g. ln_ff3a7f58). Shown in the GardenESP panel line list.
